steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to report overpayment of EUR 3,093.75 on DBK dividend payment for account 801234567
Request refund citing DE-NO tax treaty rate of 26.375% vs applied 25% withholding rate
Submit formal reclaim with supporting documentation showing correct treaty calculation
Follow up within 30 days if no response received from custodian

references.title: German Federal Ministry of Finance – Tax Treaties
